description:
Product Size: The table size is 35.44” x 19.7” x 17.72”. It provides high capacity of 220lbs.


Modern design: The unique table is oval, full of classic and fashionable feel. The desktop is smooth and simple. Transparent and tempered glass will allow you show anything you want, such as your sofa, clear floor and beautiful carpet. The Smooth edges prevent you from getting hurt.The glass surface is smooth for daily cleaning.


Storage space: The Large storage space is enough to display potted plants, books and magazines, etc. Multiple Place to Use，not just as a coffee table，can also be used as a computer table and makeup table for your office living room .


Durable structure: The 3-layer table is made of high-quality tempered glass and
Modern design: The unique table is oval, full of classic and fashionable feel. The desktop is smooth and simple. Transparent and tempered glass will allow you show anything you want, such as your sofa, clear floor and beautiful carpet. The Smooth edges prevent you from getting hurt.The glass surface is smooth for daily cleaning.

Storage space: The Large storage space is enough to display potted plants, books and magazines, etc. Multiple Place to Use,not just as a coffee table,can also be used as a computer table and makeup table for your office living room .

Durable structure: The 3-layer table is made of high-quality tempered glass and oak wood leg, making the glass table more stable and durable. Tempered glass is hard to break and safer than other glass. The design of the oak wood leg increases the feel of fashionable.

Easy assembly: With illustrated instructions, it can be installed easily. All hardware and assembly instructions are provided.
